subject: Manually deslected tilt still used for tomogram reconstruction
body:
Hi all,

I have some tomograms series where the extremes tilts are way too thick and 
where there was issue with tracking.

Is there an easy way to remove those from the tomogram reconstruction other 
than modifying the mdoc file before going to imod ?

I tried to deselect manually those tilt in tomostar mode of Warp, 
unchecking the boxes in the fourier space view, but they are still used to 
generate the tomograms.

Thank you for your help.

Best wishes,

Alain
